Body.Content:
With this new feature in OneNote mobile, you can share videos and images into OneNote and watch the magic unfold. All the key insights from the video and images are captured effortlessly into notes so that you do not have to manually create them.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: June CY2026

message.Title: OneNote: Copilot on OneNote brings in notes from Video and Images (Android)

Body.Content:
With this new feature in OneNote mobile, you can share videos and images into OneNote and watch the magic unfold. All the key insights from the video and images are captured effortlessly into notes so that you do not have to manually create them.

Update: Image‑based capture is being delivered as part of a unified multimodal capture experience in Copilot Notebooks in OneNote. Android availability will be shared in a future roadmap update. We apologize for any inconvenience.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: June CY2026
